thinks.think: A woman with dark hair in a ponytail, wearing a white t-shirt and denim shorts, bends forward near a shoe bench while handling footwear on the floor. She then shifts her weight to sit upright on the edge of the dark wooden bench, facing the glass doors with her bare feet planted on the light wooden floor.

The view cuts to a close-up of the woman's midsection and legs as she rises from a seated position. Clad in a white t-shirt and light denim shorts, she walks past the white door frame featuring a silver handle, moving rightward against a backdrop of bright green trees visible through the glass.

The person in the white t-shirt and light denim shorts walks rightward past the white door frame. Her back faces the camera, showing the back pockets of her shorts as she moves away from the glass doors. A logo reading "RATED RED" in white and red text appears in the upper right corner.

The camera cuts back to a wide angle showing the woman standing before the glass door. She grasps the handle and pulls the door open, stepping slightly forward to face the bright green trees outside. The 'RATED RED' logo remains visible in the top right corner.

A large logo with a red flame, blue hammer, and red text reading "RED HOT BUILDING" overlays the center of the screen. The woman in the white t-shirt and denim shorts walks through the open door, stepping outside onto the porch area visible through the glass.

The scene cuts to a workshop interior featuring plywood walls and shelves stocked with tools. The woman in the white t-shirt and denim shorts stands behind a large wooden workbench, leaning forward with her hands on the surface. A lower third graphic appears displaying "AMANDA MERTZ" and "RATEDRED.COM" in white text against blue and red backgrounds.

The scene returns to the entryway where the woman in the white t-shirt and denim shorts sits on the dark wooden bench with legs crossed. A red graphic banner containing the white text "SOME THINGS YOU'LL NEED" overlays the bottom of the frame.

The red banner at the bottom changes to list specific lumber dimensions in white text, such as 2x10x6 and 2x10x14, accompanied by small wood plank icons above the numbers. In the background, the woman in denim shorts remains seated on the dark wooden bench, facing towards the right side of the room near the windows.

The red banner at the bottom updates to display tool icons and names including a pencil, tape measure, miter saw, and drill. White text labels appear below corresponding graphics for each item. In the background, the woman in the white t-shirt and denim shorts remains seated on the dark wooden bench near the windows.

The red banner updates to show tools including a blue pocket hole jig, screws, paint brush, and stain can with text labels. Behind the graphic, the woman in white shirt and denim shorts bends forward, reaching down toward the shoe storage cubbies near the floor.

The red lower banner displays icons and text for a pocket hole jig, 1 1/4" pocket hole screws, paint brush, and stain. The woman in the white t-shirt and denim shorts remains bent forward at the waist, reaching down toward the storage cubbies beneath the bench.

The red lower banner updates to display icons and text for a can of polyurethane and a stack of white rags. Behind the graphic, the woman in the white t-shirt and denim shorts remains bent forward at the waist, reaching down toward the floor near the bench legs with her hair hanging down.

The scene cuts to a workshop where the woman stands behind a large wooden workbench. A split-screen montage then appears, displaying a close-up of measuring lumber, the woman smiling centrally, and a side view of her using a tool while wearing ear protection.

The view shifts to a vertical split-screen. On the left, the woman measures a wooden board with a yellow tape measure. On the right, she operates a miter saw. She wears grey earmuffs and safety glasses in both panels. A bag of rags hangs on the plywood wall behind her.

A split-screen shows the woman on the left holding a long wooden board horizontally with both hands while wearing safety earmuffs and glasses. On the right panel, a close-up captures a miter saw blade cutting through lumber as a hand operates the tool handle.

In a split-screen layout, the woman on the left sets a long wooden board down onto a workbench. On the right panel, a miter saw blade actively cuts through a piece of lumber, guided by a visible red laser line projected onto the wood surface.

summary.text: [0-2] A woman with dark hair in a ponytail, wearing a white t-shirt and denim shorts, bends near a dark wooden shoe bench handling footwear before sitting on its edge. [2-4] A close-up shows her midsection and legs as she rises and walks right past a white door frame with a silver handle against green trees. [4-6] She walks right with her back to the camera, showing her shorts' back pockets, as a "RATED RED" logo appears top right. [6-8] In a wide shot, she stands before the glass door, grasps the handle, opens it, and steps forward facing the trees while the logo remains.

[8-10] A large graphic with a red flame, blue hammer, and text "RED HOT BUILDING" overlays the screen as a woman in a white t-shirt and denim shorts exits through a glass door. [10-12] The scene cuts to a workshop with plywood walls where the woman stands behind a workbench; a lower third displays "AMANDA MERTZ" and "RATEDRED.COM". [12-14] Back in the entryway, the woman sits on a dark wooden bench while a red banner appears reading "SOME THINGS YOU'LL NEED". [14-16] The banner updates to list lumber dimensions including "1 - 2”x 10”x 6’", "1 - 2”x 10”x 5’9”", "2 - 2”x 10”x 16 1/2”", and "2 - 2”x 10”x 14”" alongside wood icons, as the woman remains seated.

[22-24] A red lower banner updates to display graphics for a can of "POLYURETHANE" and a stack of white "RAGS" while a woman in a white t-shirt and denim shorts remains bent forward at the waist, reaching down near bench legs. [24-26] The scene cuts to a workshop where the woman stands behind a large wooden workbench beneath a "RATED RED" banner, transitioning into a split-screen montage showing her measuring and smiling. [26-32] A vertical split-screen shows the woman wearing grey earmuffs and safety glasses; on the left panel, she measures a wooden board with a yellow tape measure and holds a pencil, while on the right, she leans forward to operate a miter saw. A bag of "RAGS" hangs on the plywood wall behind her as she handles long wooden boards and the saw blade cuts through the lumber in a close-up view.

In a split-screen view from [34-42], the left panel features a woman wearing grey earmuffs and safety glasses measuring a long wooden board with a yellow tape measure. She marks the wood with a pencil, then measures a smaller block before retracting the tape. The right panel shows a close-up of a blue Kobalt miter saw actively cutting through lumber. A red laser line projects onto the wood surface to guide the cut, and the "RATED RED" logo appears in the top right corner. The saw blade spins and slices through the timber as the woman completes her measurements on the left.

From 42-44s, a split-screen shows a woman in safety glasses and grey earmuffs on the left, while the right panel shows a hand positioning a wooden board under a miter saw blade, with the "RATED RED" logo in the corner. Transitioning to a wide shot at 44-46s, the woman stands behind a large workbench holding lumber, with two stacks of cut boards on the table and a "RATED RED" banner on the plywood wall behind her. From 46-50s, close-ups show the woman in a white v-neck t-shirt, grey earmuffs, and clear safety glasses. She stands near shelves holding paint cans and the banner, looking slightly left and moving her mouth as if speaking, with the logo persisting in the top right.

[50-52] A woman wearing a white t-shirt, clear safety glasses, and grey earmuffs stands in a workshop, gesturing with her left hand while speaking near shelves holding paint cans and a large 'RATED RED' banner on the plywood wall. [52-56] She secures a vertical wooden board in a blue pocket hole jig on a workbench and operates a grey and black drill to bore into the wood, with stacks of light lumber resting on the table surface to the left. [56-58] Now seen wearing denim shorts, she adjusts the vertical board within the blue jig on the wooden workbench, ensuring it is positioned correctly while the 'RATED RED' logo remains visible in the top right corner against the background.

[32-34] In a split-screen layout, a woman sets a long wooden board on a workbench while a miter saw cuts lumber guided by a red laser. [58-62] A close-up shows a blue jig holding a vertical board; white text lists "Board Thickness" and settings: "1/2", "5/8", "3/4", "7/8", "1", "1-1/8", "1-1/4". The woman uses a drill to bore into the wood. [62-64] The view widens to show the woman with long brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt and denim shorts, holding the vertical board in the blue jig. Behind her, plywood walls display shelves with tools and a large "RATED RED" banner.

A woman in a white t-shirt and denim shorts stands at a workbench, operating a power drill on a vertical wooden board secured in a blue jig. From a side angle, a red fire extinguisher is visible on the plywood wall as she drills. The view shifts to the front, showing a large "RATED RED" banner behind the lumber. She finishes drilling, lifts the tool, and smiles at the camera while holding the board upright. Later, wearing a white knotted t-shirt, she drills into a wooden corner assembly secured by a blue Irwin clamp, driving a screw where a vertical board meets a horizontal piece. Red storage bins and a miter saw appear on shelves in the background workshop.

[72-74] A woman in a white t-shirt and denim shorts drills into a wooden corner assembly secured by a blue clamp; the camera shifts to show a bag of rags on a shelf behind her. [74-76] She stands behind a workbench holding a wooden board near a frame structure with two vertical posts, beneath shelves with paint cans and a "RATED RED" banner. [76-78] She places a vertical wooden board upright into the frame structure between existing posts. [78-80] She uses a grey and black cordless drill to drive a screw into the vertical board, attaching it to the horizontal frame base on the workbench.

[20-22] A red lower banner displays icons for a pocket hole jig, 1 1/4" pocket hole screws, paint brush, and stain as a woman in a white t-shirt and denim shorts remains bent forward at the waist, reaching down toward storage cubbies beneath the bench. [80-82] She drives a screw into a vertical wooden board using a grey cordless drill, stabilizing the lumber with her left hand while operating the tool with her right, then lifts the drill away after securing the board to the horizontal frame base. [82-84] Standing behind the wooden frame on a workbench, she lifts a long, light-colored board horizontally, positioning it to rest on top of the vertical supports, with a "RATED RED" banner and shelves of paint cans visible on the plywood wall. [84-86] Leaning over the light wooden frame, she operates a grey and black cordless drill with both hands to drive a screw into the top horizontal board, attaching it to a vertical leg while the "RATED RED" banner and paint cans remain visible in the background.

[90-94] A woman with brown hair in a ponytail and white t-shirt stands behind a light wooden frame. She grips the top edge with both hands, looking down at the surface and then turning her head to look to her right along the board. The "RATED RED" banner hangs on the plywood wall behind her. [94-98] She leans over the light wooden frame structure on a workbench. She uses a grey and black cordless drill with both hands to drive a screw downwards, attaching a vertical support leg to the top horizontal board. A red pocket hole jig sits on the table to her left as she secures the wood.

[88-90] A woman with brown hair in a ponytail and a white t-shirt stands behind a light wooden frame structure, resting her hands on the top edge and gazing down into the compartments. A "RATED RED" banner hangs on the plywood wall. [98-102] She uses a cordless drill to secure a vertical support on the workbench, then stands upright holding the drill aloft in her right hand while leaning her left arm on the frame and smiling. [102-104] The scene cuts to her wearing black gloves, using a paintbrush to apply dark stain along the top edge of the lumber, with a red fire extinguisher visible in the background.

[104-108] A woman wearing black gloves and a white t-shirt applies dark stain to a light wooden frame, brushing the top edge near a red fire extinguisher before coating a vertical leg while holding a crumpled rag. [108-114] She reaches inside the structure to stain the bottom horizontal shelf, using a paintbrush to turn the light wood dark brown as a yellow stain can rests on the workbench beside the frame, with a "RATED RED" logo visible in the corner.

[116-118] A woman wearing a white t-shirt and black gloves uses a crumpled rag to apply dark stain to the interior shelves of a wooden frame, with a yellow stain can on the workbench. [118-120] She stops staining and sits on the workbench edge in a white t-shirt and denim shorts, with the dark stained bench behind her. A blue and red lower third graphic appears with "AMANDA MERTZ" and "RATEDRED.COM". [120-122] The text below her name changes to "@AMANDAMERTZ". [122-124] A blue banner with "YouTube ratedred" appears in the upper left corner, and the video frame shrinks to the left to reveal a dark wood panel background.
